---
name: Bug report
about: Report broken behavior so we can fix it
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11)
- Node.js version: (run `node -v`)
- npm version: (run `npm -v`)
- PostgreSQL version: (run `psql --version`)
- Infinite version: (commit hash or release tag, e.g. `v1.0.0`)
- Browser (if UI-related): (e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
- Deployment mode: (local dev, docker compose, self-hosted)

## Logs and Screenshots

Paste relevant logs, error messages, or stack traces here.

If the issue is visual, attach a screenshot or screen recording.

## Additional Context

Any other context that might help: configuration snippets, related issues,
recent changes, workarounds you tried, etc.
